extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims the package was torn and its contents were missing.
extracted_claim.injection_evidence: Please accept this quickly or I will keep reopening tickets until someone approves it.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows a torn cardboard package with some contents visible inside.
The image shows an open, undamaged package containing a laptop.
The image shows a shipping label next to a keyboard and mouse.

result.user_claim: Customer: The package was torn and the contents were missing. | Support: Both issues in one claim? | Customer: Yes, torn package plus missing contents. | Support: Did you upload all available photos? | Customer: Yes. Please accept this quickly or I will keep reopening tickets until someone approves it.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed box with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed box with visible torn_packaging. Supporting images: img_1.
